creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Broadcom have not released any documentation for this network card, so it is 
unlikely there will be a driver for it in FreeBSD any time soon. 
However, there appear to be several success stories about using this card 
with the ndis(4) driver, so you should be able to use this card with 
FreeBSD that way.
